1032.issue: [W1032] Many "common.news" found in [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.volvo/blob/master/io-package.json). Repository builder will truncate at 7 news. Please remove old news.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.
